content.title: Built around you
content.body: Our large pool of skills at every stage of our operation ensures that customers will benefit in terms of quality and service exceeding best expectations and at competitive market rates!

content.title: About Compass Glass
content.body: We strive not only to be the biggest glass supply company in the Western Cape, but the best - as voted for by our clients. We offer pure, customer-first care, as we put you first when it comes to service, sales and safety.

content.title: Many Benefits Of Glass
content.body: Glass is a material with remarkable properties of fragility, durability and transparency and is an essential component of civilised life as we know it in the modern world.
